title: The Penal Code
writer: Edward T. Lowe Jr., F. Hugh Herbert
actors: Regis Toomey, Helen Cohan, Pat O'Malley
plot: A young boy in a small town turns to a life of crime. After serving a prison sentence, he returns home determined to go straight but finds himself being blackmailed into a safecracking operation at a bank--organized by his romanti...
